## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential GrowthX AI content marketing engagement for Apriora (formerly Apriori)](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI offers comprehensive content marketing solutions, combining AI tools with expert strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Apriora is considering GrowthX AI's services but needs to justify the investment and commitment to their CEO](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [GrowthX AI typically sees traction by month 3, with 6-8 month engagements possible instead of standard 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Apriora recently rebranded to alex.com, indicating rapid changes in the company](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Approach and Differentiators

  - [Combines AI tools with deep human expertise in content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Typically starts with a 2-month strategy sprint, producing 15-25 articles while developing a scalable process](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Works with high-level talent (e.g., 20+ years SEO experience) that would be costly to hire in-house](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Adapts to client needs, working alongside internal teams or taking full ownership of content production](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Tiro: Grew from no blog and 20 authority score to significant traffic growth in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Ramp: Ongoing collaboration with established internal content team](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Various clients seeing traction around month 3, with compounding growth thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Apriora's Situation and Needs

  - [Recently rebranded to alex.com](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Considering building in-house team vs. outsourcing to GrowthX AI](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [CEO values talking to other founders about their experiences](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Potential content angles: AI in interviews, technical recruiting challenges, staffing agency focus](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### Pricing and Commitment Considerations

  - [Standard engagements start around $15k/month for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Possibility of shorter 6-8 month engagement to address commitment concerns](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [2-month strategy sprint included in engagements](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send proposal, share strategy sprint details, and additional materials](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Kyle to create shared Slack channel for easier communication and example sharing](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Donald to review materials and discuss internally with Apriora CEO](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Potential call to be arranged between Marcel (GrowthX AI) and Aaron (Apriora)](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Donald to reach out to George at Ramp for reference on GrowthX AI's work](https://fathom.video/share/FNr_MUr1zn9-Nsuc_Ym1-yw7ss7Gxya_?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
